## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do, and why? Link any related issues. -->

## Changes

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] New provider
- [ ] Docs / chore

## Test plan

<!-- How did you validate the change? List commands, manual steps, or new tests. -->

- [ ] `make lint`
- [ ] `go test ./...`
- [ ] Manual verification (describe)

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated.
- [ ] Documentation updated (`README.md`, `CHANGELOG.md`, godoc).
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or local DB files included in the diff.
- [ ] If adding a provider: registered in `engine/register.go` and tests included.
